extraction_metadata.note: IFC model has no room definitions (IfcSpace). Room data will come from PDF drawing extraction via Vision LLM.
extraction_metadata.llm_gap_analysis:
* For the 6 walls missing material, infer their material properties by analyzing their location within the building (e.g., exterior vs. interior, wet areas) and the material properties of adjacent walls.
* For all 47 walls missing fire rating, assign a default fire rating (e.g., 1-hour or 2-hour) based on the assumed building occupancy type and local building code minimums.
* For the 47 walls missing fire rating, infer more specific fire ratings by analyzing their adjacency to fire-rated elements (e.g., stairwells, shafts, fire compartments) or their function (e.g., demising walls, corridor walls).
